lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: What can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What could you make for me?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: I mostly just make what I find pretty. I sometimes make dye for the women's clothes to brighten the place up. I can make red, yellow and blue dyes. If you'd like some, just bring me the appropriate ingredients.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need to make red dye?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: 3 lots of redberries and 5 coins to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, make me some red dye please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I have all the ingredients yet.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: You know what you need to get, now come back when you have them. Goodbye for now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can do without dye at that price.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: That's your choice, but I would think you have killed for less. I can see it in your eyes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get redberries?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: I pick mine from the woods south of Varrock. The food shop in Port Sarim sometimes has some as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What other colours can you make?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: Red, yellow and blue. Which one would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: You're welcome!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need to make yellow dye?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: Yellow is a strange colour to get, comes from onion skins. I need 2 onions and 5 coins to make yellow dye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, make me some yellow dye please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get onions?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: There are some onions growing on a farm to the East of here, next to the sheep field.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need to make blue dye?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: 2 woad leaves and 5 coins to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, make me some blue dye please.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: Woad leaves are fairly hard to find. My other customers tell me the chief gardener in Falador grows them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I am happy the colour I am.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: You are easily pleased with yourself then. When you need dyes, come to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cool, do you turn people into frogs?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: Oh, not for years, but if you meet a talking chicken, you have probably met the professor in the manor north of here. A few years ago it was flying fish. That machine is a menace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mad old witch, you can't help me.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: Oh, you like to call a witch names do you?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: That's a fine for insulting a witch. You should learn some respect.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: Oh, you like to call a witch names do you?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: That's a fine for insulting a witch. You should learn some respect.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: Oh, you like to call a witch names do you?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: Thank you for your kind present of some flour. I am sure you never meant to insult me.

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: You should be careful about insulting a witch. You never know what shape you could wake up in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make dyes for me please?

lines.speaker: Aggie
lines.text: What sort of dye would you like? Red, yellow or blue?
